commands.resetminecrafttoolsconfig.succe: Config Reset for Minecraft Tools mod (MODID: "minecraft_tools")
commands.suicide.failure: /suicide was disabled in the world owner's config.
commands.itemkill.success.none: There were no dropped items to kill.
commands.itemkill.failure.nonplayerandem: Must provide either target selector or be executed by a player.
commands.xpkill.success.none: There were no Experience Orbs to kill.
commands.dropkill.success.none: There were no mobloot drops to kill.
commands.xpkill.failure.nonplayerandempt: Must provide either target selector or be executed by a player.
----COMMENT----: Can't seem to find anything about command descriptions for /help so I'll just leave this as it is below (doesn't work yet)
commands.itemkill.description: Kills all entities in target selector passed that are dropped items (so "/itemkill @e" would just be "/kill @e[type=item]"), defaults to @e if no argument is passed. Must be executed by a player if no argument is given.
